message:
test(proptest): commit regression seeds for dry_run, runtime, and wait suites

Add proptest-regressions files containing minimal failing seeds discovered
during test runs.  These seeds are committed per proptest convention so
that regressions are automatically replayed on every subsequent test
invocation, preventing silent re-introduction of previously caught bugs.

Files:
- proptest_dry_run.proptest-regressions: 1 new seed
- proptest_runtime.proptest-regressions: 8 seeds (new file)
- proptest_wait.proptest-regressions: 7 seeds (new file)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 58e4b2f977c91c1743b1d5f66ff45db8796c2f9cc91518b91ddddc8233434b41 # shrinks to report = DryRunReport { command: "", target_resolution: None, policy_evaluation: None, expected_actions: [], warnings: [] }
+cc d54d50fc54e70183f5fb3a8100c4da593d0c1ada15702ca8fbe27c4499e67df2 # shrinks to pane_id = 0, domain = "cwd"

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc cdd77af6ada640ed99a630c2525e703591098dedc4b7362ca5a5f82855682f4e # shrinks to snap = RuntimeLockMemoryTelemetrySnapshot { timestamp_ms: 0, avg_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, p50_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, p95_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, max_storage_lock_wait_ms: 10.236631110953935, storage_lock_contention_events: 0, avg_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, p50_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, p95_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, max_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, cursor_snapshot_bytes_last: 0, p50_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0, p95_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0, cursor_snapshot_bytes_max: 0, avg_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0.0 }
+cc 7dad310447c3825be99d7a17c37306a69444340b029fb8423d468fdd54a58d4a # shrinks to snap = RuntimeLockMemoryTelemetrySnapshot { timestamp_ms: 0, avg_storage_lock_wait_ms: 922.4305788741601, p50_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, p95_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, max_storage_lock_wait_ms: 0.0, storage_lock_contention_events: 0, avg_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, p50_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, p95_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, max_storage_lock_hold_ms: 0.0, cursor_snapshot_bytes_last: 0, p50_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0, p95_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0, cursor_snapshot_bytes_max: 0, avg_cursor_snapshot_bytes: 0.0 }

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 051fb238a297304e59b4b2341540e6bf3831832008ab4d77495cf2e3f9ab42f8 # shrinks to max_ms = 100, factor = 1, current_ms = 101
